first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same. Minor differences in wording, such as specifying the scale of team growth or mentioning regulated environments, are reasonable elaborations on the core assessment and fall within the range of normal run-to-run variation. There is no evidence that the change in job locations from various international cities to the United States influenced the evaluation.
